items.headline_en: n8n release feed now shows stable
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for n8n changed and the newest visible tag is stable. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-24T07:59:04Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
items.evidence_excerpt: title=stable updated=2026-04-27T09:56:19Z link=https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/stable summary= content=2.17.8 (2026-04-27) Bug Fixes Disable "Get 100 free OpenAI API credits" if aiGateway enabled in the license ( #29058 ) ( 11c5ad9 ) editor: Refresh wallet balance when usage refresh is clicked ( #29081 ) ( 5e95d38 ) title=n8n@2.17.8 updated=2026-04-27T09:57:34Z link=https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n%402.17.8 summary= content=2.17.8 (2026-04-27) Bug Fixes Disable "Get 100 free OpenAI API credits" if aiGateway enabled in the license ( #29058 ) ( 11c5ad9 ) editor: Refresh wallet balance when usage refresh is clicked ( #29081 ) ( 5e95d38 )
